dossierSteps.name: Recognition note
dossierSteps.detail: Why the candidate crossed novelty or advantage thresholds.

dossierSteps.name: Reproduction manifest
dossierSteps.detail: Fixed seeds, artifact hashes, environment, and replay instructions.

dossierSteps.name: Stress-test bundle
dossierSteps.detail: Policy shocks, sensitivity deltas, and failure-mode register.

dossierSteps.name: Persistence report
dossierSteps.detail: Minimum pass rate under shocks and baseline comparison.

dossierSteps.name: Rollback plan
dossierSteps.detail: Containment, stop authority, monitoring, and release gates.

dossierSteps.name: Council memo
dossierSteps.detail: Decision asks, dissent register, and approval boundaries.

dossierSteps.name: Synthetic receipt
dossierSteps.detail: Public-safe record of decision state and remaining proof debt.

rule: A breakthrough is not a narrative; it is a deterministic state transition with mandatory reproduction, stress testing, persistence, and packaging.
